title: UBSE result 2026 out highlights: Uttarakhand class 10 and 12 results out; Geetika Pant and Sushila Mendiratta top state
description: UBSE result 2026 out highlights: The Uttarakhand Board of School Education (UBSE) has announced the class 10 and class 12 board exam results for 2026. Students can access their UBSE results on ubse.uk.gov.in using their roll numbers. Stay tuned for live updates, direct link, toppers list and more.
